subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy mention was recorded in this prison, wherefore thou hast attained unto mention by the Pen of the Command. This is the counsel of this Servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ذکرت در این سجن مذکور شد لذا بذکر قلم امر فائز شدی وصیت غلام
subcodes.subjects: @hypocrisy, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
